# material

**Instance Property**

An object that describes the intended surface appearance of the submesh for rendering.

## Declaration

```swift
var material: MDLMaterial? { get set }
```

## Discussion

A [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMaterial] object describes the complete set of rendering parameters for producing a specific surface appearance, such as color, texture, specularity, and opacity.
title: material
